To fix the "Uncaught Error: Minified React error #31" (Objects are not valid as a React child), we need to resolve the version mismatch in the `index.html` import map.

**Explanation of the issue:**
The error message indicates that a React Element (an object with keys `$$typeof`, `type`, etc.) was passed to a React Renderer that didn't recognize it. This commonly occurs when multiple versions of React are loaded simultaneously (e.g., React 18 and React 19). Your current `index.html` imports React 18 explicitly for your libraries but also includes catch-all mappings for React 19 (`react/` and `react-dom/` pointing to `aistudiocdn`), causing a conflict.

**The Fix:**
I will update `index.html` to remove the conflicting React 19 entries from the import map, ensuring the application strictly uses React 18.2.0 consistent with your other dependencies (`react-router-dom`, `lucide-react`, `react-quill`).
